arts.ttl: Leicester City told key dates as Premier League drop 2025/26 season reveal
arts.sum: Leicester City have been informed of some key dates for the 2025/26 season as the Premier League have announced when the campaign will start and end. In a statement, the Premier League said: “The Premier League 2025/26 season dates have been confirmed, with the opening match round starting on Saturday 16 August 2025.

arts.ttl: Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall sends classy message to Leicester City star after injury blow
arts.sum: Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall has sent a classy message of support to former teammate and Leicester City star Abdul Fatawu following news of his season-ending injury. Dewsbury-Hall followed the Italian to west London after playing a huge part in helping Leicester return to the Premier League.
